title: plugin-manager:plugin-errors
description: Defines error classes for plugin operations. All errors extend the base `SpecdError` from the domain.
context: Defines error classes for plugin operations. All errors extend the base `SpecdError` from the domain.

rules:
```typescript
class PluginValidationError extends SpecdError {
  readonly pluginName: string
  readonly fields: string[]
}
```

The error MUST include:

- The plugin name that failed validation
- Array of fields that failed validation

constraints: Errors SHOULD be catchable by type for error handling.
